title: Bitter Crunchy Mediterranean Olives Crumble
description: This meal-prep polish dish features a blend of bitter olives, pickle relish, and mediterranean-friendly spices in a crunchy, satisfying crumble that's perfect for breakfast or snack.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup finely diced cucumber pickle relish

instructions: Stir together the olive relish, oregano, sumac, and salt in a medium bowl.
Add the olives to the spice mixture and toss gently with your hands until well combined.
Fold in the grated Parmesan cheese and black pepper.
Transfer the olive crumble mix to a lined baking dish.
Drizzle over 2 tablespoons of olive oil and sprinkle with the remaining tablespoon of olive oil on top.
Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
